narrative:
Cols 65-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 984 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points.
